title: How to extract specific complex type from JSON type
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Question
I need to query only `Array(String)` from my JSON.
The problem is that `:.Array(String)` does not work.
```
CREATE TABLE users (
uid Int16,
kv JSON
) ENGINE=MergeTree order by uid;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, '{"1": [1,1]}');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, '{"1": ["a","b"]}');
SELECT uid, kv."1"::Array(String) as c FROM users order by uid;
+-----+-----------+
| uid | c         |
+-----+-----------+
1. |   1 | ['1','1'] |
+-----+-----------+
2. |   2 | ['a','b'] | ----<<< I need only this.
+-----+-----------+
SELECT uid, kv."1".:`Array(String)` as c FROM users order by uid;
+-----+----+
| uid | c  |
+-----+----+
1. |   1 | [] |
+-----+----+
2. |   2 | [] | -- expected  ['a','b']
+-----+----+
```
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/a0a3cb99-15a3-4e84-86d1-50e50aaa0a97
@Avogar
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (uid INTEGER, kv VARCHAR);
SELECT uid, REGEXP_REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(kv, '{"1":', ''), '}', ''), '"', '') AS c FROM users WHERE kv IS NOT NULL AND kv LIKE '%"1":%' ORDER BY uid;
key_bug_features: Extracting Array(String) from JSON type fails
